name: runtime-context
description: Injects the current date, time, weekday and timezone into every turn so Elowen never guesses about "now". Cache-safe: it rides the user message, not the system prompt.

configSchema.label: Timezone
configSchema.hint: IANA timezone, e.g. Europe/Prague. Empty = the server's own timezone. This is YOUR timezone for the whole assistant: it sets the date/time injected into every turn AND the clock every scheduled job runs on, so "daily 07:30" fires at 07:30 where you are.
